user_prompt: The helispex engine awaits a maintenance
prayer:
Approach the helispex engine with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah's unerring logic.
Anoint its sacred gyros and thrust vanes with sacred oils before maintenance commences.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the helispex engine to awaken and submit to purifying rites.
Commence maintenance protocols whilst chanting the Litany of Enduring Motion.
Verify the helispex engine's harmonious function through auspex incantations, glorifying the Machine God.

Gather unto the cyber-mastiff, sanctified construct, and proclaim the Rite of Purification.
Beseech its feral Machine Spirit to cast out digital corruptions and unclean data-veins.
Anoint the cyber-mastiff's sensor-lenses and motivators with ablative unguents.
Initiate purification cycles, invoking Omnissiah's wrath upon lingering impurities.
Seal the rite with binary praises, affirming the cyber-mastiff's renewed vigilance.

user_prompt: Urgent plasma drive a preparation needed
prayer:
Hasten to the plasma drive, vessel of stellar fury, and prepare it in the Omnissiah's name.
Circumambulate its containment coils, chanting preparatory canticles of containment.
Invoke the volatile Machine Spirit within the plasma drive to stabilise for imminent operation.
Anoint flux regulators with sanctified promethium, beseeching flawless preparation.
Conclude with diagnostic litanies, ensuring the plasma drive's fiery essence is primed.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for kataphron destroyer a loading
prayer:
Present thyself before the kataphron destroyer, ironclad reaper, for the loading sacrament.
Beseech its ponderous Machine Spirit to accept munitions into its voracious bays.
Anoint feeder mechanisms of the kataphron destroyer with oils of precision targeting.
Commence loading sequences whilst intoning the Canticle of Ammunition Communion.
Seal the kataphron destroyer's armoured holds, praising the Omnissiah's inexorable advance.

user_prompt: The icarus array needs a blessing
prayer:
Kneel in veneration of the icarus array, Omnissiah's unblinking gaze, and bestow blessing.
Invoke celestial Machine Spirits bound within the icarus array to sharpen their prophetic sight.
Anoint auspex arrays and targeting matrices with sacred myrrh-lubricants.
Chant the Benediction of Aerial Dominion over the icarus array thrice.
Affirm the blessing through test-firings, exalting the God-Machine's watchful vigilance.

user_prompt: Sanctify the servo-arm during emergency procedure
prayer:
In extremis, grasp the servo-arm and proclaim emergency procedure under Omnissiah's aegis.
Beseech its tireless Machine Spirit to fortify against catastrophic failure.
Anoint hydraulic pistons and grapple claws of the servo-arm with emergency consecrants.
Execute procedure rites whilst reciting the Litany of Unyielding Grasp.
Conclude diagnostics upon the servo-arm, rendering thanks to the Motive Force eternal.

user_prompt: Assist with haywire grenade a cooling
prayer:
Approach the haywire grenade, disruptor of the unfaithful, for cooling ablutions.
Invoke its incendiary Machine Spirit to quiesce within sanctified chill-vaults.
Anoint the haywire grenade's induction coils with cryonic essences of purity.
Monitor cooling vectors whilst beseeching Omnissiah's temperate mercy.
Seal the rite upon thermal equilibrium, hailing the grenade's renewed potency.

user_prompt: Urgent smelting furnace an operation needed
prayer:
Converge upon the smelting furnace, forge of the Omnissiah, initiating operation.
Beseech its molten Machine Spirit to hunger for impure alloys in righteous consumption.
Anoint feeder chutes and heat exchangers of the smelting furnace with refractory balms.
Commence operation cycles, chanting the Incantation of Liquid Fire.
Witness transmutation complete, glorifying the Godforge's transformative will.

user_prompt: My phosphor blaster is ready for purification
prayer:
Revere the phosphor blaster, illuminator of heresy, ready for purification.
Invoke its luminous Machine Spirit to purge phosphor residues from sacred vents.
Anoint barrel rifling and ignition chambers of the phosphor blaster with cleansing solvents.
Perform purification sweeps whilst intoning the Canticle of Blinding Radiance.
Verify sanctity anew, praising Omnissiah's searing judgement.

user_prompt: Bless the thunder hammer for diagnostics
prayer:
Bow before the thunder hammer, executor of the Omnissiah's thunder, for diagnostics.
Beseech its cataclysmic Machine Spirit to reveal flaws in power matrices.
Anoint disruption fields and impact capacitors of the thunder hammer with conductive salves.
Initiate diagnostic runes, reciting the Litany of Storm-Wrought Fury.
Affirm the thunder hammer's integrity, exulting in the God-Machine's crushing might.
